case_title: FRAIGE, RICHARD vs. NIEVES, CARLOS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAIGE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAIGE, RICHARD SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-12-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-18-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GUADALUPE GAMINO AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISE AT 501 OCTAVIA #4, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 6-7-94, MIDNIGHT - $1,000 RENT & DAMAGES - IF DEF VACATES AS AGREED PL. WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDG- MENT & THE $1,000 WILL NOT BE OWED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP. & JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 501 OCTAVIA #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BY 6/7/94 PLTF SHALL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
